ingredients_text: 44% Saffron Rice (Water, Basmati Rice, Onion, Rapeseed Oil, Salt, Cumin Seeds, Turmeric, Cardamom Pods, Ground Cinnamon, Saffron), 36% Tikka Sauce (Onion, Single Cream (Milk), Water, Tomato, Butter (Milk), Yogurt (Milk), Tomato Purée, Garlic Purée, Rapeseed Oil, Cashew Purée [Water, Cashews], Ginger Purée, Dried Coriander, Salt, Paprika, Coriander Leaf, Sugar, Cornflour, Cumin, Garam Masala Seasoning [Coriander, Cumin, Ginger, Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Cloves, Cardamom, Bay Leaf], Green Chilli, Turmeric, Colour: Paprika Extract; Cumin Seed, Fenugreek, Ground Cinnamon), 20% Cooked Marinated Chicken Breast Pieces (84% British Chicken, Yogurt (Milk), Rapeseed Oil, Lemon Juice, Garlic Purée, Ginger Purée, Tandoori Masala Seasoning [Paprika, Chilli, Coriander, Cumin, Garlic Granules, Ground Cinnamon, Clove, Fennel, Bay Leaf, Salt, Colours: Beetroot Red, Paprika Extract; Acid: Citric Acid; Lemon Oil], Ground Paprika, Cornflour, Salt, Garam Masala Seasoning [Coriander, Cumin, Ginger, Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Cloves, Cardamom, Bay Leaf], Green Chilli, Colour: Paprika Extract, Dried Chilli).
